message:
docs(bevy): mark Phase 0 scaffolding as in progress

RedSnow has begun work on the Bevy integration Phase 0 scaffolding,
which includes:

- Creating the new `crates/scriptbots-bevy` crate
- Adding `bevy_render` workspace feature flag
- Building minimal Bevy app that opens window and clears background
- Target: `cargo run --features bevy_render --renderer=bevy` opens blank window

This status update in the rollout phases table (line 126) signals active
development and prevents duplicate effort from other contributors.

Phase 0 is the foundation for all subsequent Bevy integration work:
- Phase 1: Static world visuals (terrain + agents)
- Phase 2: Camera controls (orbit + follow modes)
- Phase 3: HUD parity (tick stats, controls, selection)
- Phase 4: Interactivity (agent selection, follow toggles)
- Phase 5: Polish + QA (performance, lighting, CI)

Related: PLAN_TO_INTEGRATE_BEVY_ENGINE_TO_SCRIPTBOTS.md (commit dd37514)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

-| 0 | Scaffolding | New crate, feature flag, minimal Bevy app that opens window and clears background. | `cargo run --features bevy_render --renderer=bevy` opens blank window. |
+| 0 [Currently In Progress – RedSnow 2025-10-30] | Scaffolding | New crate, feature flag, minimal Bevy app that opens window and clears background. | `cargo run --features bevy_render --renderer=bevy` opens blank window. |
 | 1 | Static world visuals | Render terrain, agents as instanced meshes/quads, static camera. | Snapshot harness for Bevy path produces comparable frame to GPUI. |
 | 2 | Camera controls | Orbit + follow modes mapped, input parity with GPUI (mouse, keyboard). | QA sign-off that camera UX matches spec. |
 | 3 | HUD parity | Overlay tick stats, controls, selection info. | HUD shows same metrics as GPUI reference screenshot. |
